tests.name: Baseline Execution
tests.command: eamilos run "Create a Python file hello.py that prints Hello World"
tests.details: Project created successfully. Fallback parser triggered. File created and executed correctly.

tests.name: Multi-Task Flow
tests.command: eamilos run "Create two Python files: a.py prints A, b.py prints B"
tests.details: Only 1 file created with wrong filename 'of'. Fallback parser misidentified filename from code context.
tests.failureReason: Fallback parser misidentified 'of' from 'with open()' statement

tests.name: Dependency Simulation
tests.command: eamilos run "Create a Python module utils.py with a function greet(), then create main.py that imports and uses it"
tests.details: Both files created but main.py has wrong content. LLM ignored import instruction.

tests.name: Invalid/Ambiguous Input
tests.command: eamilos run "Make something useful in Python"
tests.details: System made reasonable assumption (todo app). Generated code has syntax errors.

artifacts.error: IndentationError: unindent does not match any outer indentation level

tests.name: No Tool Response (Force Fallback)
tests.command: eamilos run "Create a file test.py that prints Testing"
tests.details: Tools confirmed disabled. Fallback parser triggered successfully. File created correctly.

tests.name: Large Output
tests.command: eamilos run "Create a Python script with 100 print statements"
tests.details: File created with loop for 100 prints. Not truncated. Filename incorrectly derived from project ID.

metadata.filenameIssue: Derived from project ID instead of meaningful name

tests.name: Invalid Code Generation
tests.command: eamilos run "Create a Python file with intentional syntax error"
tests.details: LLM refused to create bad code (good behavior). No file created.

tests.name: Repeat Execution (Idempotency)
tests.command: eamilos run "Create hello.py that prints Hello World" (twice)
tests.details: Each run creates new project. No collision. Content preserved correctly.

tests.name: Resource/Limit Test
tests.command: eamilos run "Generate 10 Python files each printing a number"
tests.details: No files created. LLM returned script instead of individual files. Fallback parser couldn't extract 10 files.
tests.failureReason: Fallback parser limitation - can't extract multiple files from single response

tests.name: Failure Recovery
tests.command: timeout 5 eamilos run "Create a Python file complex.py"
tests.details: Process interrupted. Recovery mechanism triggered. Task marked as 'interrupted'. No corrupted state.

issues.title: Multi-file extraction fails
issues.description: Fallback parser can't extract multiple files from single code block or scripts that create files
issues.fix: Implement tool calling for stronger models or improve parser to handle file creation scripts

issues.title: No code validation
issues.description: Generated code not syntax-checked before commit to workspace
issues.fix: Add syntax validation step in artifact creation pipeline

issues.title: Filename inference uses project ID
issues.description: When no filename detected, fallback parser uses project ID as filename

issues.title: phi3:mini ignores complex instructions
issues.description: LLM doesn't reliably follow multi-step instructions or import requirements
issues.fix: Use stronger model (qwen2.5, mixtral) or improve system prompt

issues.title: Slow LLM response times
issues.description: Ollama phi3:mini takes 30-90 seconds per request
issues.fix: Use faster model or implement streaming with progress indicator

recommendations.recommendation: Enable tool calling for stronger Ollama models (qwen2.5, mixtral)
recommendations.rationale: Tool calling enables reliable multi-file creation and artifact management
Prevent invalid code from being committed as artifacts

recommendations.recommendation: Improve fallback parser for multi-file scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Current parser fails for complex requests with multiple files
Users need feedback during slow LLM responses
Project ID as filename is confusing and unhelpful
